title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: Get up and running with Llama 3.2, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, published on PyPI as `ollama`.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, published on npm as `ollama`.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package (`langchain-ollama` on PyPI) to use Ollama models as LLMs or embedders.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama (now renamed ‘Open WebUI’).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama, available on Maven Central.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API for chatting and managing models.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community-driven recipes and examples for using Ollama with Python, Go, Rust, Docker, etc.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and model auto-pull.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem (`ollama-rb`) providing a simple client for the Ollama API.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n community node to call Ollama models inside automation workflows.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Ready-made Docker Compose stacks bundling Ollama with Open WebUI, NVIDIA runtime, and RAG addons.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal Python template showing retrieval-augmented generation using Ollama + ChromaDB.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that chats powered by any Ollama model.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Lightweight Slack bot server using Socket-mode to expose Ollama models in channels/DMs.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Dart/Flutter package (`ollama_dart`) for communicating with the Ollama API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library (`OllamaSharp` on NuGet) providing async/chat/embedding clients for Ollama.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts via Ollama inside your notes.
